name: research-skills
description: Research productivity skills for Claude Code: paper-digest, research-survey, and research-context.

plugins.name: paper-digest
plugins.description: Deep-read research papers and produce self-contained structured Markdown notes focused on the paper's story, concrete technical method, module-level design, formulas, experiments, limitations, and research inspiration.

plugins.name: research-survey
plugins.description: Build rigorous, problem-driven research surveys for a specific research direction. Supports effort levels (lite/standard/deep) and anti-hallucination verification.

plugins.name: research-context
plugins.description: Provides the user's research direction, domain keywords, and related fields as shared context for other skills like paper-digest and research-survey.
